✦   With Love   ✦

Mummy

My first home. My forever anchor.

HAPPY MOTHER'S DAY  ·  2026

SCROLL

A letter from your child

My dearest Mummy,

There are some things in life that need no occasion to be said — but today, on this day made for you, I want to say them louder than I ever have.

You are the reason I know what warmth feels like. Every meal you made, every journey you took with us, every quiet moment when you sat beside me without needing to say a word — those are the moments I carry closest to my heart.

I see you in the green of the mountains, in the rush of the Ganga at Rishikesh, in the stillness of a lakeside afternoon. You have always been someone who makes every place feel like home simply by being there.

Thank you for your strength, your grace, your laughter, your sacrifices — most of which I may never even know. Thank you for always showing up, always believing in us, always being you.

You are my greatest blessing. Happy Mother's Day.

— With all my love 💛

Cherished Moments

A life beautifully lived

Graceful as always ✦
Dressed in elegance
By the lake, serene
Misty mountain mornings
At the Ganga, Rishikesh

Together, always

What makes you, you

A woman of infinite grace

🌿

Strength

Quiet, unshakeable, and always steady — you are the foundation we all stand on.

💛

Love

A love that asks for nothing and gives everything. The kind you feel without words.

✈️

Adventurous Spirit

From misty hills to sacred rivers — you embrace every journey with joy.

🌸

Elegance

In every saree, every kurta, every smile — you carry yourself with effortless grace.

💛

Happy Mother's Day, Mummy

Made with love, just for you.

2026  ·  ALWAYS & FOREVER
